text: @) Interface Endpoints @ nsnemansnin. © s * Provide private access to AWS Public Services « historically.... anything NOT S3 and DDE .. but S3 is now supported & @ & * Added to specific subnets - an ENI - not HA * For HA .. add one endpoint, to one subnet, per AZ used in the VPC * Network access controlled via Security Groups ¢ Endpoint Policies - restrict what can be done with the endpoint ¢ TCP and IPv4 ONLY e Uses PrivateLink
